heading: Qualified health plan defined
label: 18021 Qualified health plan defined
notes: References in TextThis title, where footnoted in text, is title I of , , , which enacted this chapter and enacted, amended, and transferred numerous other sections and notes in the Code. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 111–148124 Stat. 130Mar. 23, 2010

children.label: A
children.text: has in effect a certification (which may include a seal or other indication of approval) that such plan meets the criteria for certification described in issued or recognized by each Exchange through which such plan is offered;section 18031(c) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: provides the essential health benefits package described in ; andsection 18022(a) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: is licensed and in good standing to offer health insurance coverage in each State in which such issuer offers health insurance coverage under this title;1

children.label: ii
children.text: agrees to offer at least one qualified health plan in the silver level and at least one plan in the gold level in each such Exchange;

children.label: iii
children.text: agrees to charge the same premium rate for each qualified health plan of the issuer without regard to whether the plan is offered through an Exchange or whether the plan is offered directly from the issuer or through an agent; and

children.label: iv
children.text: complies with the regulations developed by the Secretary under and such other requirements as an applicable Exchange may establish.section 18031(d) of this title

children.heading: Inclusion of CO–OP plans and multi-State qualified health plans
children.label: 2 Inclusion of CO–OP plans and multi-State qualified health plans
children.text: Any reference in this title to a qualified health plan shall be deemed to include a qualified health plan offered through the CO–OP program under , and a multi-State plan under , unless specifically provided for otherwise.1section 18042 of this titlesection 18054 of this title

children.heading: Treatment of qualified direct primary care medical home plans
children.label: 3 Treatment of qualified direct primary care medical home plans
children.text: The Secretary of Health and Human Services shall permit a qualified health plan to provide coverage through a qualified direct primary care medical home plan that meets criteria established by the Secretary, so long as the qualified health plan meets all requirements that are otherwise applicable and the services covered by the medical home plan are coordinated with the entity offering the qualified health plan.

children.heading: Variation based on rating area
children.label: 4 Variation based on rating area
children.text: A qualified health plan, including a multi-State qualified health plan, may as appropriate vary premiums by rating area (as defined in ).section 300gg(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Terms relating to health plans
children.label: b Terms relating to health plans

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “health plan” means health insurance coverage and a group health plan.

children.heading: Exception for self-insured plans and MEWAs
children.label: B Exception for self-insured plans and MEWAs
children.text: Except to the extent specifically provided by this title, the term “health plan” shall not include a group health plan or multiple employer welfare arrangement to the extent the plan or arrangement is not subject to State insurance regulation under .1section 1144 of title 29

children.heading: Health insurance coverage and issuer
children.label: 2 Health insurance coverage and issuer
children.text: The terms “health insurance coverage” and “health insurance issuer” have the meanings given such terms by .section 300gg–91(b) of this title

children.heading: Group health plan
children.label: 3 Group health plan
children.text: The term “group health plan” has the meaning given such term by .section 300gg–91(a) of this title
